creator: chrysalis@chrysalisnet.org
text:
I wiped /tmp/ports with rm -rf, and then reconfigured to /usr/ports, and now is working.

So maybe there was a temporary breackage on the repo or something, I will update again if the issue comes back.

My theory as to what went wrong.

On the first run it showed scanning local repo, and I assume stored some info on the /usr/ports contents, then after I wiped the contents instead of checking again, it assumed it was still populated via some internal cache, and it only cleared this cache after I changed the path.

So maybe remove this cache function or add a override for it as a fix for the scenario?

Thats my theory.
